onset.Description: The time point at which a specific event begins

duration.Description: The length of time a specific event lasts

color_type.Description: The index of the color presented as stimulus (1=Red #ff0000, 2=Orange #ffaa00, 3=Yellow-green #aaff00, 4=Green #00ff00, 5=Cyan-green #00ffa9, 6=Sky blue #00a9ff, 7=Blue #0000ff, 8=Purple #aa00ff, 9=Pink #ff00aa), corresponding to colors arranged around the hue circle

report_type.Description: Whether the participant was asked to report color similarity in this trial

Levels.Report: Participant was instructed to report color similarity
Levels.No_Report: Participant was not instructed to report color similarity

score_eval.Description: Color similarity rating score on a scale from -4 to 4. 9000 indicates the participant moved the cursor but did not submit a response. 9999 indicates a No_Report trial (no rating required).
